items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne handbag is crafted from blue Oblique jacquard fabric, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is exquisitely decorated with a '30 Montaigne' embossed logo, and the military-style buckle design is sharp and refined. The small size comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
items.name_cn:
This 30 Montaigne handbag is crafted from blue Oblique jacquard fabric, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is exquisitely decorated with a '30 Montaigne' embossed logo, and the military-style buckle design is sharp and refined. The small size comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD clasp
'30 Montaigne' embossed logo on the back
Detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Back pocket
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 21 x 13.5 x 7 cm
Number: M9234UTZQ_M928

items.name_cn:
MONTAIGNE Chain Bag
M9208
The M 30 Montaigne product line is inspired by 30 Montaigne, highlighting the classic identity. This handbag is exquisitely decorated with Oblique jacquard fabric, creating an elegant and classic look. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Elegant details such as the '30 Montaigne' embossed logo on the back highlight the fashionable design. It comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. items.name_en: [Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
items.name_cn:
[Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this tote bag is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. Designed for daily essentials, this large tote features all-over embroidery paired with the iconic blue Dior Oblique pattern and a "Christian Dior" logo on the front. Fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, it can be paired with other small accessories or Mitzah scarves for a cohesive look!
Adjustable, removable embroidered shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
2 internal patch pockets
Includes dust bag
Number: M1323CZBB_M928
Dimensions: 42×35×18.5cm

items.name_en: Small CD Signature Vanity bag blue Oblique print
items.name_cn:
Small CD Signature Vanity bag blue Oblique print
Exclusive channel goods, latest arrival
Dimensions: 16 x 11 x 9.5 cm
This CD Signature Vanity bag is a new addition to the Fall/Winter 2023 collection, practical and elegant, enriching the Travel Classic series. Crafted with blue Oblique fabric, the top and bottom are adorned with CD embossed logos, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The interior is elegant and spacious, featuring a double-zipper closure for a refined look. Small size, with a hard leather top handle and a removable, adjustable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal companion for daily use.
Wide internal compartment
Double-zipper closure with zipper pull
Removable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Leather wrist strap
Dimensions: 16*11*9.5cm
Model: 2203

items.name_en: 24K relief box bag with water diamonds ⭐️⭐️ Different happiness! Classic styles are coming out one after another, the box bag is somewhat familiar~ C, how can the classic box bag be absent? "+ The faces of this new arrival are somewhat familiar, it is also the return of a classic model. One is the classic box bag, the chain is decorated with carved diamonds 💍, combining leisure and versatility, and also has a different freshness. The multi-pocket design creates a stronger sense of layering, making a big innovation on the single shape of the box, like a combination of a box bag and a camera bag, full of personality. Model A Dimensions: 10-17-8 With packaging

items.name_en: CHANE* 24b Double C logo mini flap, made of polished calfskin quilted, soft, delicate, and elastic. Large Double C logo paired with vintage sand gold hardware, full of personality, a perfect blend of retro and fashion, super eye-catching, looks stylish with any outfit! Simple yet not simple design, looks stunning on. From leather selection to stitching, every detail is carefully crafted, offering high durability and practicality. Whether appearance or inner quality, it withstands the test of time. This Chanel calfskin mini flap is definitely a fashion lover's choice. Made of precious black gold calfskin, delicate and soft, exuding noble temperament, highlighting feminine softness while remaining elegant. Classic large Double C logo makes this bag even more brilliant. Can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, fits a phone and daily essentials, high usage rate, making you look elegant and intellectual. A must-have bag!

items.name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag
This piece is from the Gucci Lido series, inspired by the summer vibes and beach clubs of the Italian coast. The new small leather goods series playfully uses vibrant colors to present eye-catching new works. This shoulder bag features a classic silhouette, cleverly paired with a button closure and internal hook clasp for easy attachment of matching wallets or clutches. The new light blue and brown GG canvas complements the brown leather trim, while the double-G accessories add a bright touch.
Model: 783141.
Size: 16.5(W)x 9.5(H)x 4.5cm(D)
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas.

With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Marmont series small denim shoulder bag

This small chain shoulder bag from the GG Marmont series features a soft yet structured design, equipped with a large flap buckle decorated with double-G accessories. The chain shoulder strap is ingeniously designed, offering versatile carrying methods that allow for free switching between shoulder and handbag styles.
Model: 443497.
Size: 26(W)x 15(H)x 7cm(D)
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas.

items.name_en: 🌟🌟🌟CHANEL 22bag mini	It's so cool~ it's my favorite, just browsing... completely want to buy a bag, eye-catching, must grab it haha! The SA was very nice. Chanel patent calfskin paired with vintage hardware, quilted, the mini 22bag is more refined than the larger size. The chain design is so Coco, double chains ⛓➕ leather strap chains ⛓, full of details. Tighten and open the bag using the two short leather chains on the front, the two long shoulder straps on the back are purely for carrying.

specs.rawTitle:
🌟🌟🌟CHANEL 22bag mini	It's so cool~ it's my favorite, just browsing... completely want to buy a bag, eye-catching, must grab it haha! The SA was very nice. Chanel patent calfskin paired with vintage hardware, quilted, the mini 22bag is more refined than the larger size. The chain design is so Coco, double chains ⛓➕ leather strap chains ⛓, full of details. Tighten and open the bag using the two short leather chains on the front, the two long shoulder straps on the back are purely for carrying.
Size: 20*19*6cm/AS3980
